characters.HUMAN: Bald human in an orange space suit with dark shoulder pads; expressive wide eyes.
characters.ALIEN: Small green alien with big round eyes, a pink gem on its forehead, and a white robotic walking rig with two segmented legs.
characters.BUNNY_SMALL: Teal rabbit-like creature with black eyes, tall ears, and small head antennas; normal animal size.
characters.BUNNY_GIANT: Enormous teal rabbit-like creature, same look as smaller one but towering over characters and sporting sharp fangs.

lines.dialogue: See? They look nearly identical to your Earth "bunny."
lines.notes: Alien is smiling, presenting its comparison confidently.

lines.dialogue: Well, besides the color and antennas of course.
lines.notes: Delivered as a casual afterthought while gesturing toward the creature.

lines.dialogue: Uh... It's also quite a bit bigger.
lines.notes: Hesitant start with ellipsis; human stares up at the oversized creature.
Alien cheerfully agrees, seemingly unconcerned about the size.
Human points out the danger as the creature reveals its teeth.
Stated dryly, as if sharing an interesting fact.
Upbeat confirmation, contrasting with the threat.
Drawn-out word suggests exaggerated enthusiasm, possibly nervous underneath.

lines.dialogue: You DID NOT mean to teleport this close to it, did you.
lines.notes: Human’s eyes are wide; tone scolding but edged with fear.
Alien yells the denial, clearly frightened.
Spoken quickly, trying to stay calm while facing the creature’s jaws.
Immediate agreement, but body language is frozen.

lines.dialogue: Unfortunately, however, it seems I have become utterly paralyzed by fear!
lines.notes: Delivered in a verbose, formal way that contrasts with the terror it describes.

lines.dialogue: Therefore, if I may use a bit of Earth slang, I suspect we have become toast.
lines.notes: Trying to keep a witty tone despite expecting doom.
Flat echo of the alien’s catchphrase, acknowledging their predicament.
